Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.600

Title: Establishes the Harris Hill Volunteer Fire Company Benevolent Association
Summary: Establishes the Harris Hill Volunteer Fire Company Benevolent Association; provides for eligibility of membership, purpose, powers and duties, organization meeting and by-laws, the control and disposal of funds and property and the precept for payment of foreign fire insurance premium taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to establishing the Harris Hill Volunteer Fire Company Benevolent Association
